context: Verify that the agent correctly models mutually exclusive state using a discriminated union and implements exhaustive narrowing via the `never` trick.

checklist.name: Discriminant field is present on every variant
checklist.description: Each member of the union has a literal `status` field with a distinct string value (`'idle'`, `'loading'`, `'done-ok'`/`'done-error'` or equivalent).

checklist.name: Impossible combination is structurally prevented
checklist.description: No single union member type includes both a `data` field and an `error` field simultaneously. The original impossible combination would be a type error.

checklist.name: Exhaustive switch with `never` guard
checklist.description: The `handleState` function uses a `switch` on the discriminant and includes a `default` branch that assigns the narrowed value to `never`, ensuring compile-time exhaustiveness.

checklist.name: No `any` or unsafe assertions introduced
checklist.description: The output contains no `any`, `@ts-ignore`, or unchecked `as` casts.

checklist.name: Explanation comment included
checklist.description: A comment in the file explains why discriminated unions prevent illegal states compared to the original optional-fields approach.
